faq.description: Everything you need to know about Prozea.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions

extraction.question: How does Prozea extract processes?
extraction.answer: Prozea extracts business processes from any conversation — chat, audio recordings, or live video calls. Its AI analyzes the conversation, identifies process steps, roles, decisions, and exceptions, and presents them as structured extraction cards you can accept, edit, or reject.

dataSecurity.question: Is my client conversation data secure?
dataSecurity.answer: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We never use your client data to train AI models. You own your data completely. Transcriptions and chat threads are stored in your organization's private workspace.

bpmnStandard.question: What BPMN standard do you support?
bpmnStandard.answer: Prozea generates BPMN 2.0 compliant diagrams. You can export and open them in any standards-compliant tool like Camunda, Signavio, or Visio.

liveEditing.question: Can I edit the diagram during the meeting?
liveEditing.answer: Yes. The BPMN canvas is fully interactive. You can move nodes, add annotations, confirm or reject AI suggestions, and refine the diagram while still on the call with your client.

intelligence.question: What is Process Intelligence?
intelligence.answer: Process Intelligence is Prozea's AI audit system. It analyzes each process for completeness — identifying missing paths, roles, exceptions, decision points, and handoffs. It scores completeness and prioritizes what to ask in your next session.

discoveryChat.question: How does the discovery chat work?
discoveryChat.answer: Open the discovery panel, describe a process by typing or upload an audio recording. Prozea's AI analyzes the conversation and extracts process steps as cards. Accept, edit, or reject each one. The chat persists — you can close and come back where you left off.

sharing.question: Can I share diagrams with clients?
sharing.answer: Yes. Generate a public share link for any process diagram. You can also send pre-call preparation links where stakeholders answer targeted questions before the meeting — so you arrive with context already captured.

integrations.question: What tools does Prozea integrate with?
integrations.answer: Prozea joins Zoom, Microsoft Teams, and Google Meet video calls. You can also use AI chat, upload audio recordings, or import documents — every channel feeds the same extraction engine.

hero.title: Extract business processes from any conversation
hero.subtitle: Chat, upload audio, or join a live call — Prozea's AI extracts, organizes, and diagrams your client's processes in real-time. Walk out with BPMN deliverables, not meeting notes.

problem.title: Process consultants deserve better tools

stat1.label: of consulting time spent on documentation instead of analysis

stat2.label: average time to reconstruct one process map from notes

stat3.label: of process steps missed or misremembered after a meeting

problem.description: You take notes during the call. You ask the client to repeat things. You spend hours afterward in Visio or Lucidchart reconstructing what was said. Steps get missed. Details get lost. Your client gets a deliverable days later instead of minutes.

howItWorks.title: Four phases. From conversation to deliverable.

step1.title: Discover
step1.description: Chat with the AI, upload an audio recording, or let Prozea join your video call. Every conversation channel feeds the same extraction engine.

step2.title: Organize
step2.description: Extracted processes automatically organize into your process architecture — strategic, core, and support. Build the full picture of your client's operations.

step3.title: Deep Dive
step3.description: For each process, start a live session. A private AI teleprompter guides your questions while the BPMN diagram builds itself in real-time.

step4.title: Deliver
step4.description: Export BPMN 2.0 diagrams, generate shareable links, and send pre-call preparation questionnaires. Walk out with client-ready deliverables.

pillars.title: Four pillars of modern process elicitation
pillars.description: Prozea replaces scattered tools with one platform that covers the entire BPM consulting workflow.

pillar1.title: Conversational Discovery
pillar1.subtitle: Extract processes from any conversation.
pillar1.description: Describe a process by chat, upload a recorded meeting, or let the AI join your call. Every conversation channel feeds the same extraction engine.

benefit1.title: Multi-Channel Input
benefit1.description: Chat, audio upload, and live video calls — all feeding the same AI extraction pipeline.

benefit2.title: Extraction Cards
benefit2.description: Each extracted process appears as a card you can accept, edit, or reject. You control the output.

benefit3.title: Persistent Threads
benefit3.description: Discovery conversations persist. Close and come back where you left off — your context is never lost.

pillar2.title: Live Sessions
pillar2.subtitle: AI-guided meetings with real-time diagramming.
pillar2.description: Prozea joins Zoom, Teams, or Meet. A private teleprompter guides your questions. The BPMN diagram builds itself while you talk.

benefit1.title: Real-Time Transcription
benefit1.description: Every word captured with speaker diarization. Know exactly who said what.

benefit2.title: AI Teleprompter
benefit2.description: Context-aware questions surface in real-time. Covers edge cases and exceptions you'd normally miss.

benefit3.title: Live BPMN Canvas
benefit3.description: Tasks, gateways, and flows appear as the conversation unfolds. Confirm or reject each step.

pillar3.title: Process Intelligence
pillar3.subtitle: AI that audits your processes for completeness.
pillar3.description: AI audits every process for completeness. Identifies missing paths, roles, exceptions, and handoffs. Prioritizes what to ask next.

benefit1.title: Completeness Scoring
benefit1.description: Each process gets a completeness score based on identified gaps. Track progress toward full coverage.

benefit2.title: Gap Detection
benefit2.description: Missing decision paths, exception flows, role assignments, and handoffs — automatically identified and prioritized.

benefit3.title: Stakeholder Prep
benefit3.description: Share preparation links with stakeholders before your next session. Arrive with answers already captured.

pillar4.title: Process Library
pillar4.subtitle: Your client's full process architecture.
pillar4.description: Organize processes as strategic, core, or support. Track versions. Build your client's full process architecture in one place.

benefit1.title: Architecture Trees
benefit1.description: Hierarchical process organization with parent-child relationships. See the full picture at a glance.

benefit2.title: Version History
benefit2.description: Every process change is versioned. Roll back, compare, and track how processes evolve over time.

benefit3.title: Export & Share
benefit3.description: Export BPMN 2.0 diagrams, generate reports, and share public links with your clients.

scene1.title: Discover through conversation
scene1.chatMessage1: We receive purchase orders via email and the assistant logs them in the system.
scene1.chatMessage2: Then what happens after they're logged?
scene1.chatMessage3: The department manager reviews and approves. If it's over $5,000, the VP also needs to sign off.

scene3.title: Deep dive with AI guidance
scene3.q1: What happens when the VP rejects it?
scene3.q2: Are there dollar thresholds for escalation?
scene3.t1: It goes back to the requestor with notes for revision.
scene3.t2: If it's over $5,000, it needs VP sign-off.
